properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: He was called a rebel, they called him a fool, He was living in darkness, breaking the rules, He walked in his own way, and thought he knew best, But there was a darkness that wouldn't let him rest.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: But mercy found room for me, yes, mercy found room for me, In a world full of sin, I was lost and could not see, But the hands of mercy lifted me up, set my spirit free, And mercy found room for me, yes, mercy found room for me.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I'd tried so hard to fix it, to find my own way To make things right, to brighten my day, But the chains of my failures, they held me tight, And I was fading away in the endless night.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: No one else could save me, no one could heal But there's a love so powerful, it made me feel A hope that had been missing, a peace I'd never known And a heart that was empty, was finally my own.
